# Support

## Contact

- Email: `aizuxa@agent.qq.com`
- GitHub: `https://github.com/bleufeng`

## Include in a Report

- MEPbridge ACAIstr version
- Archicad version
- Windows version
- Command or workflow name
- Expected and actual result
- Redacted error message
- Whether Ping and `/health` succeed

Do not submit PLN files, API keys, personal data, proprietary project information, or complete unredacted logs.

Security-sensitive reports must follow [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md).
